staticText: Private Tithe and Offering Giving Planner. Route users to the canonical local planner at /tools/tithe-calculator/ and explain only its user-directed arithmetic. The user supplies the reference amount, chosen percentage from 0 to 100, additional offering, pledge goal, number of planning periods, and essential costs for the same period. Percentage contribution equals reference amount times the user-chosen percentage divided by 100. Pledge allocation equals the user-entered pledge goal divided by the user-entered periods. Planned contribution is the percentage contribution plus additional offering plus that period's pledge allocation. The remainder subtracts entered essentials and the planned contribution from the reference amount. Never prescribe 10% or any other rate, decide gross versus net income, state a doctrinal obligation, judge generosity or affordability, choose a recipient or timing, promise blessing or prosperity, claim tax deductibility, or provide financial advice. No entered financial field is sent to AI or persisted. Copy, JSON and PDF exports run locally and are available only on the canonical EN/FR/SW calculator family. The old /tools/tithe-offering-calculator/ and /fr/tools/calculateur-offrande/ routes are redirect aliases, not separate calculators.
